source_pr.title: planner: add index optimizer hint
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

Support SQL hint `use index` in comment-style optimizer hint. 

### What is changed and how it works?

Add new hint field into `planbuilder`,  and add matched `ast.IndexHint` into `ast.TableName` when build data source.

``` mysql
mysql> explain select /*+ INDEX(t, c_d_e) */ a from t t1;
+-------------------+----------+------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| id                | count    | task | operator info                                                              |
+-------------------+----------+------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| IndexReader_5     | 10000.00 | root | index:IndexScan_4                                                          |
| └─IndexScan_4     | 10000.00 | cop  | table:t1, index:c, d, e, range:[NULL,+inf], keep order:false, stats:pseudo |
+-------------------+----------+------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
2 rows in set (0.00 sec)
```


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

symptoms: sql: "select /*+ INDEX(t, c_d_e, f, g) */ * from t order by f", (planner/core/physical_plan_test.go)
failure_signature: sql: "select /*+ INDEX(t, c_d_e, f, g) */ * from t order by f", (planner/core/physical_plan_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Exact plan/EXPLAIN assertions are brittle when optimizer choices can vary. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: sql: "select /*+ INDEX(t, c_d_e, f, g) */ * from t order by f", (planner/core/physical_plan_test.go)
